title: Scaffold Issues screen directory, screen registry entry, and navigation wiring
description: Create the apps/tui/src/screens/Issues/ directory structure with index barrel export. Register the IssueList and IssueDetail screen IDs in the screen registry (apps/tui/src/router/screens.ts). Wire g i go-to keybinding to navigate to the issue list screen (requires repo context). Create placeholder components for IssueListScreen, IssueDetailScreen, IssueCreateForm, and IssueEditForm that render basic loading states. Set up the e2e/tui/issues.test.ts test file with the test harness scaffolding.
acceptanceCriteria: g i from any screen with repo context navigates to issue list screen
Issue list screen renders placeholder with 'Issues' title in header breadcrumb
Screen IDs 'issue-list', 'issue-detail', 'issue-create', 'issue-edit' are registered in screen registry
q from issue list pops back to previous screen
e2e/tui/issues.test.ts compiles and test harness launches TUI successfully

title: Implement issue data hooks: useIssues, useIssue, mutations, comments, events, labels, milestones, collaborators
description: Create TUI-side data hooks wrapping the @codeplane/sdk issue services. Hooks: useIssues (paginated list with state filter, 500-item cap), useIssue (single issue, 30s cache), useCreateIssue, useUpdateIssue (optimistic + revert), useIssueComments (paginated), useIssueEvents (paginated), useCreateIssueComment (optimistic append), useRepoLabels, useRepoMilestones, useRepoCollaborators, useAddIssueLabels, useRemoveIssueLabel. All hooks consume APIClientProvider context and handle 401/404/network errors.
acceptanceCriteria: useIssues returns { issues, loading, error, loadMore, hasMore } with cursor-based pagination
useIssues supports state filter parameter passed to API query string
useIssue returns { issue, loading, error, mutate } with 30-second cache
useCreateIssue returns mutation function that POSTs and returns created issue
useUpdateIssue supports optimistic local state update with revert on 4xx/5xx
useIssueComments returns paginated comments with loadMore and 500-item memory cap
useIssueEvents returns paginated timeline events
useCreateIssueComment supports optimistic append with pending indicator
useRepoLabels, useRepoMilestones, useRepoCollaborators return full lists
All hooks read auth token from APIClientProvider context
All hooks handle 401, 404, and network errors

title: Implement LabelBadge component with color mapping, luminance floor, and overflow handling
description: Create the <LabelBadge> component for rendering colored label badges across all issue surfaces. Badge format: [label-name] with brackets in muted color, name in mapped label color. Color mapping: truecolor (hex), ANSI 256 (nearest palette), ANSI 16 (nearest basic). Luminance floor: brighten colors below 0.15. NO_COLOR=1 support. Configurable truncation (12ch list, 30ch detail, 40ch picker). Overflow algorithm: +N indicator. CJK/emoji double-width accounting. Also create color resolution utility.
acceptanceCriteria: LabelBadge renders [label-name] with brackets in muted color and name in label color
Color detection cascade: truecolor, ANSI 256, ANSI 16 works correctly
Colors below 0.15 relative luminance are brightened
NO_COLOR=1 disables all color output
Label text truncated with ellipsis at configurable max width
Overflow algorithm shows +N indicator when labels exceed available width
CJK characters and emoji measured as double-width
Component accepts label object with name, color, and optional description

title: Issue list screen with pagination, state icons, row rendering, and navigation to detail
description: Full-screen issue list for repository-wide browsing. ListComponent with useIssues() cursor pagination (30/page, 500 cap). Rows: state icon (green/red), #N, title, label badges, author, comment count, timestamp. j/k navigation, Enter opens detail, c opens create, x closes/reopens. Default filter: open. Responsive columns at 80x24/120x40/200x60. Loading spinner, empty state, status bar hints.
acceptanceCriteria: Issue list renders with state icon, number, title, labels, author, comment count, timestamp
Cursor-based pagination loads next page at 80% scroll
500-item memory cap evicts oldest pages
j/k moves focus, Enter pushes issue detail, c pushes create form
x triggers close/reopen on focused issue with optimistic update
Default state filter shows open issues
Empty state renders 'No issues found' with create hint
Responsive layout adapts at 80x24, 120x40, 200x60
Loading spinner during fetch and pagination
q returns to previous screen

title: Cross-cutting label rendering with picker overlay, mutation support, and integration surfaces
description: Full label display system: interactive LabelPickerOverlay (l/L keybindings), multi-select with fuzzy search, Space toggle, Enter confirm, Esc cancel. Max 10 labels. Responsive overlay sizing. Optimistic label mutations via API. Integration across list rows, detail, forms, and filters. Uses LabelBadge for rendering with color mapping and overflow.
acceptanceCriteria: l key on list opens label picker, L on detail opens label picker
Picker renders all repo labels with color preview and checkboxes
Fuzzy search filters labels, Space toggles, Enter confirms, Esc cancels
Max 10 labels selected, optimistic mutations with revert on error
Correct rendering at all color depths and NO_COLOR=1
Overflow +N indicator in list rows
Responsive overlay sizing at all breakpoints

title: Persistent filter toolbar with state, label, assignee, milestone filtering and sort
description: Filter toolbar below header: f cycles state (Open/Closed/All), o cycles sort order, l opens label picker (AND logic), a opens assignee picker (single-select), m opens milestone picker (single-select), x clears all. State filter server-side with 150ms debounce, label/assignee/milestone client-side. Active filters shown as badges. Filters persist across detail navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: f cycles state filter with toolbar update and 150ms debounced API refetch
o cycles sort order
l/a/m open respective picker overlays
x clears all filters to defaults
Client-side filtering for labels/assignees/milestones
Active filter badges and count shown in toolbar
Filters persist across detail navigation and back

title: Inline search with client-side filtering and server-side full-text search
description: / key focuses search input. Client-side immediate substring match (title, body, labels, author). Server-side q param at 2+ chars with 300ms debounce. Match count badge, match highlighting in rows. Max 120 chars. Esc clears. Respects active filters (intersection). Pagination works during search.
acceptanceCriteria: / focuses search, Esc clears and defocuses
Client-side substring matching on title, body, labels, author
Server-side search at 2+ chars with 300ms debounce
Match count badge and text highlighting
Respects active filters, max 120 chars, pagination works

title: Full-screen issue detail with metadata, markdown body, timeline, dependencies, and actions
description: Issue detail pushed from list Enter. Header: number, title, state badge, author, timestamps. Metadata sidebar at standard+ (assignees, labels, milestone, dependencies). Body via <markdown> with syntax highlighting. Timeline section (comments + events interleaved). j/k scroll, n/p comment jump, G/gg, e edit, o close/reopen, c comment, L labels, q back. Responsive at all breakpoints. 30s data cache.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders header with number, title, state badge, author, timestamps
Markdown body with syntax highlighting via <markdown>
Metadata sidebar at standard+ with assignees, labels, milestone, dependencies
j/k scroll, n/p comment jump, G/gg top/bottom
e pushes edit, o close/reopen, c focuses comment, L labels, q back
Dependencies section with clickable issue references
Responsive at 80x24, 120x40, 200x60
Loading and 404 error states

title: Single-key close/reopen toggle with optimistic updates, bulk operations, and error handling
description: x on list / o on detail toggles issue state. Optimistic <16ms update. Status bar messages. In-flight guard. Idempotent. Bulk: Space select + x with confirmation >5. Error handling: 403/404/429/500/timeout with appropriate messages and revert.
acceptanceCriteria: x on list and o on detail toggle issue state
Optimistic update <16ms with revert on error
Status bar success/error messages
In-flight guard prevents double-toggle
Bulk select + close with confirmation >5
403/404/429/500/timeout error handling
Idempotent: no API call for already-matching state

title: Full-screen issue creation form with validation, selectors, and optimistic navigation
description: c from list pushes create form. Fields: Title (required, 255 max), Body (textarea, markdown), Assignees (multi-select), Labels (multi-select with color), Milestone (single-select), Submit, Cancel. Tab/Shift+Tab cycle, Ctrl+S submit, Esc cancel with dirty confirmation. Client 422 field-level errors. Double-submit prevention. On success push detail. Responsive textarea height and layout.
acceptanceCriteria: c from list pushes create form with all fields
Tab/Shift+Tab cycles fields, Ctrl+S submits, Esc cancels
Client-side title required validation
Server 422 field-level error mapping
Double-submit prevention, 'Creating...' indicator
On success push detail, on error preserve form
Esc dirty confirmation, responsive layout

title: Full-screen issue edit form with pre-population, dirty tracking, and delta PATCH
description: e from detail pushes edit form. All fields pre-populated from useIssue(). Dirty tracking: only changed fields in PATCH. Tab order: Title, Body, Labels, Assignees, Milestone, Save, Cancel. Ctrl+S save, Esc with dirty confirmation. 409 conflict reload prompt, 422 field errors. On success pop to detail.
acceptanceCriteria: e from detail pushes pre-populated edit form
Dirty tracking: only modified fields in PATCH payload
Ctrl+S saves, Esc with dirty confirmation
409 conflict reload prompt, 422 field errors
Double-submit prevention, on success pop to detail
Loading state while fetching issue data

title: Paginated chronological comment and timeline event display with interleaving
description: Comment and timeline display in detail screen. Comments: author, timestamp, markdown body (50k char cap). Events: icon, description, timestamp (muted). Interleaved by created_at. Cursor pagination 30/page, 500 total cap. n/p jump comments, j/k scroll, G/gg. Optimistic new comments with pending indicator. Current user comments show [edit][delete].
acceptanceCriteria: Comments render with author, timestamp, markdown body
50k char truncation with 'Show full comment' notice
Timeline events as muted single-line entries with icons
Chronological interleaving by created_at
Cursor pagination, 500 item cap, n/p comment jump
Optimistic comments with pending indicator
Empty state message

title: Inline comment creation textarea with submit, validation, and optimistic append
description: c focuses textarea at detail bottom. Responsive height (5/8/12 lines). Captures keys except Ctrl+S/Esc/Ctrl+C. Ctrl+S submits, validates non-empty, trims whitespace. Double-submit prevention. Optimistic append with pending indicator, revert on error with content restore. Esc discard confirmation if content.
acceptanceCriteria: c focuses textarea, responsive height at breakpoints
Keys captured by textarea except Ctrl+S, Esc, Ctrl+C
Ctrl+S submits, empty/whitespace rejected, content trimmed
Double-submit prevention, 'Submitting...' indicator
Optimistic append with pending, revert on error with content restore
Esc discard confirmation if content, immediate defocus if empty

title: Unified keybinding dispatch, priority resolution, help overlay, and status bar hints
description: Capstone: useIssueKeyboard() hook with 6-layer priority (text input > modal > go-to > sub-screen > issue-wide > global). Status bar hints responsive to width. Help overlay (?) with grouped keybindings, scrollable, max 8 groups/20 entries. Command palette issue actions. Esc cascade: overlay > search > form confirmation > pop. No conflicts per context. 16ms handler budget.
acceptanceCriteria: 6-layer priority hierarchy resolves conflicts correctly
Text input captures keys, global shortcuts still work
Go-to mode with 1500ms timeout and status bar indicator
Status bar hints responsive to terminal width
? opens scrollable help overlay with grouped keybindings
Issue actions in command palette
Esc cascade: overlay > search > form confirmation > pop
No conflicts per context, 16ms handler budget
Rapid input handled without drops
